---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new section, rule, or capability for the .readmeAI template
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the situation where the current template falls short.
Example: "When working on a monorepo, the AI doesn't know how to navigate between packages because..."

## Proposed solution

Describe what you want added or changed. If it's a new section, show what it would look like:

```markdown
## 🆕 NEW SECTION NAME

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| ...   | ...   |
```

## Why this belongs in the core template

Explain why this applies to most web projects, not just your specific case.
If it's project-specific, consider it a personal extension rather than a core addition.

## Have you tested this?

- [ ] Yes — I added this section to my own `.readmeAI` and the AI used it correctly
- [ ] No — this is a proposal I haven't tested yet

If yes, describe what happened when the AI read the new section.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why didn't they work?
